hero.title: Tokenization of premium real estate in a prestigious tourist destination
hero.subtitle: Launching a Security Token Offering (STO) for a community of 20 luxury villas and creating a digital token for real estate investment on blockchain.
hero.lead: The project enabled investors to participate in premium real estate ownership with minimal entry, using blockchain technology.

overview.title: Project overview
overview.text: A boutique community of twenty luxury villas in a prestigious tourist destination partnered with Ukrainian Legal and Tech Partners to launch a Security Token Offering (STO). The project created a digital token that allows investors to participate in real estate ownership using blockchain.

solution.title: Solution
solution.text: The tokenization initiative used modern blockchain technologies to ensure:

result.title: Result
result.text: The STO was presented at an international crypto and blockchain festival that gathered over 50,000 investors. The project demonstrated how tokenization can transform real estate investments by improving accessibility and efficiency.

hero.title: Building an innovative blockchain-based digital identity platform
hero.subtitle: A solution to simplify and secure access to tokenized assets and DeFi services.
hero.lead: A unified, interoperable entry point that makes tokenization accessible for investors and businesses.

overview.title: Project overview
overview.text: Ukrainian Legal and Tech Partners created a transformational blockchain-based digital identity solution designed to simplify and secure access to tokenized assets and decentralized finance (DeFi) services. This innovative product offers a single, interoperable entry point so users can interact with a broad range of virtual assets, making tokenization accessible to both individual investors and businesses. The solution, currently in beta testing within a large blockchain network, eliminates repetitive verification processes and enables seamless navigation across offerings.

items.i2: ensures compliance with KYC and AML regulations
items.i4: creates a single entry point for working with digital assets

result.title: Result
result.text: Delivered to a global audience, the digital identity solution lays the foundation for future expansion, including support for additional blockchain networks and enhanced security features. Its launch demonstrates a commitment to bridging traditional finance and web3, enabling users to unlock new investment opportunities with transparency and efficiency. This project shows how advanced blockchain technology can reshape user interaction in digital finance, offering a scalable, secure, and user-friendly solution that paves the way for the future of tokenized assets.

hero.title: Subscription-based crypto education platform
hero.subtitle: Building a crypto learning platform with GDPR compliance and a mobile app launch.
hero.lead: The platform provides secure, subscription-based access to educational materials.

overview.title: Project overview
overview.text: The company developed a cryptocurrency education platform that provides subscription-based access to ensure a seamless, secure, and compliant user experience. The platform was created to offer enthusiasts an educational space and convenient access to materials and services. To ensure compliance, the project underwent comprehensive technical and legal review, following App Store Guidelines and the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), as well as other applicable laws.

solution.title: Solution
solution.text: To deliver the project, the team completed:

items.i2: third-party service checks for GDPR compliance
items.i3: implementation of transparent user consent flows
items.i4: creation of an intuitive and secure interface

solution.outcome: This ensured a high level of privacy, security, and user trust.

result.title: Result
result.text: A successful App Store launch demonstrated the team’s ability to build a high-quality mobile app aligned with regulatory requirements and tailored for a global audience. The initiative highlighted the power of combining innovation with strict compliance, creating a safe and user-friendly platform that enables confident learning in the crypto space.

about.title: Ukrainian Legal and Tech Partners
about.lead: Ukrainian Legal and Tech Partners is a unique project that unites legal, technological and compliance expertise.

founder.title: Founder
founder.name: Svitlana Rudiuk
founder.text: Founder - Svitlana Rudiuk, an expert in national and international taxation and WEB.3.0 solutions practices.
founder.experience: Experience in national and international taxation practices, WEB.3 solutions practices is more than twelve years.
founder.specialization: Specializes in solving issues related to international and national taxation, including, but not limited to: corporate and personal tax planning, tax structuring, constructing of holding structures, structuring of M&A deals, attracting financing, and personal tax declaration measures.

web3.title: WEB.3.0 practice
web3.text: In WEB.3.0 practice provides legal support to clients at all stages of tokenization, obtains the status of a VASP or CASPʼs provider, ensures compliance, and opens accounts for VASP or CASP’s providers.

about.speaker: Speaker, author of publications.

credits.title: Partnerships and professional associations
credits.association: Expert of the International Association of Tax Advisors

approach.title: Work approach
approach.p1: I have been working in national and international taxation and WEB 3.0 solutions for over twelve years. During this time, I have helped businesses and investors solve complex legal and technological issues by combining legal expertise with an understanding of modern technologies.
approach.p2: My practice covers a wide range of tasks, from tax planning, business structuring, and building holding structures to legal support for projects in blockchain, tokenization, and virtual assets.
approach.p3: I support clients at all project stages, assist with compliance, obtaining VASP statuses, as well as opening accounts and building legal structures.
approach.p4: In addition to practical work, I speak publicly, publish professional materials, contribute to legislative initiatives, and take part in legal training and mentoring.
approach.p5: I am fluent in Ukrainian and English and work with clients from different countries. If you need support or consultation, I am always ready to provide professional assistance.

tax.title: Tax practice
tax.t1: Advising on the application of the provisions of tax legislation

tax.t3: Providing recommendations on choosing the most effective model for implementing a cross-border agreement or business scheme and selecting appropriate jurisdictions for companies, taking into account the provisions of international agreements
tax.t4: Supporting the business restructuring process and the process of structuring operations
tax.t5: Developing and supporting optimal individual schemes for the purchase and sale of assets (business, real estate, intellectual property, etc.)
tax.t6: Advising on compliance with transfer pricing legislation and controlled foreign companies legislation
tax.t7: Advising on the application of international treaties on the avoidance of double taxation and the international exchange of tax information
tax.t10: Consulting and preparation of necessary documents on the application of tax benefits provided by current legislation
tax.t11: International tax planning for private clients
